services.name: Node Runtime Provider
services.summary: Release-backed Node provider used by the baseline and by services that execute through execservice.

services.name: Local Certificate Provider
services.summary: Core certificate utility used by the Traefik baseline to produce local certificate outputs.

services.name: NGINX Service
services.summary: Managed NGINX Open Source service started before Traefik in the default baseline.

services.name: Traefik Edge Router
services.summary: Release-backed edge/router service with local certificate and NGINX dependencies.

services.name: Echo Service
services.summary: Harness service for lifecycle, UI/API, health, logs, state, SQLite, and failure testing.

services.name: Service Admin
services.summary: Browser-based operator UI served as a managed Service Lasso service.

services.name: Python Runtime Provider
services.summary: Release-backed Python provider for consumers that need Python-backed local services.

services.name: Java Runtime Provider
services.summary: Release-backed Java provider for consumers that need Java-backed local services.

services.name: ZITADEL
services.summary: Release-backed identity service for apps that own the required database, domain, and secret configuration.

services.name: Dagu
services.summary: Release-backed workflow service for apps that own their workflow definitions and orchestration contract.

services.name: PostgreSQL
services.summary: Release-backed PostgreSQL service for apps that need a local relational database such as Keycloak or ZITADEL dependencies.

services.name: MongoDB
services.summary: Release-backed MongoDB service for apps that need a local document database with managed data, auth, and TCP health.

services.name: Node Reference App
services.summary: Plain Node host template for server-side apps, CLIs, dev tools, and automation-first integrations.

services.name: Web Reference App
services.summary: Browser-hosted template for teams that want a web shell around Service Lasso and Service Admin.

services.name: Electron Reference App
services.summary: Desktop template for teams that need Node integration, native-feeling windows, and familiar Electron packaging.

services.name: Tauri Reference App
services.summary: Desktop template for lean native shells that prefer Rust/Tauri packaging around a Service Lasso runtime.

services.name: pkg Packager Reference App
services.summary: Packaging template for producing pkg-based Node executables with source, bootstrap, and bundled outputs.

services.name: SEA Packager Reference App
services.summary: Packaging template for Node Single Executable Application experiments and SEA-style distribution.

services.name: nexe Packager Reference App
services.summary: Packaging template for teams evaluating nexe-based Node executable distribution.
